text:
Market today: Ugly tape for your book. The Mag-7/momentum unwind is the real driver — that's a direct headwind for your chip and high-beta tech names. Margin makes every down-tick sting harder than it looks on paper.

Your holdings: AVGO is the house on fire — down 16% and flagged SELL, your largest position on margin. That's where the real dollar pain lives. PLTR is down 13% and also flagged SELL — two simultaneous bleeders is a margin account's worst setup. SPAL is a 2x leveraged ETF already down 17% from your entry — leverage decay plus a volatile underlying means this can move against you fast; your stop at $19 is close, watch it daily. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited price history — manage it manually and keep size small.

Watch: 1) Whether Mag-7 selling accelerates or stabilizes — your whole book follows that trade. 2) AVGO specifically — it's your largest position and already below comfort zone.

Bottom line: Your two biggest fires are AVGO and PLTR — decide on size cuts before the market decides for you.
